meta.title: AI Tech Talking-Head Overlay Component System
meta.brief: A visual mood board for Remotion overlay effects that sit above talking-head AI technology videos.
meta.business: AI 科技类博主 Remotion 视频特效体系
meta.goal: Turn six talking-head overlay component families into a unified but diverse visual specification focused on screen position, visual form, and motion character.
meta.audience: Viewers interested in AI tools, technology trends, product launches, practical methods, and industry judgment.
notes: Each tile is one single visual reference image: one talking-head frame plus one primary overlay component family.
Do not create live-action brand mood imagery, product photography, collage, grid, or mini mood board.
No readable text, no logos, no fake source facts, no fake metrics, no real UI data.
Preserve central presenter safety and bottom subtitle safety.

layout: no ordinary component inside presenter safety zone
visualLanguage: minimal placeholder bars instead of readable text

items.title: Source Evidence Dock - Left Sidebar
items.caption: A traceable-source panel lives in the side lane, with a small anchor cue and no factual text.
items.source: Component family: 来源证据 Dock
items.motif: left glass sidebar, source anchor dot, compact placeholder bars, central presenter safety
items.palette: charcoal black, white strokes, restrained cyan, muted gold
items.prompt: Single clean motion-design frame for an AI technology talking-head video, 16:9. A neutral abstract presenter silhouette is centered, with a dashed presenter-safe zone and a calm empty bottom subtitle-safe band. A dark translucent glass source-evidence dock floats in the left side lane only, with thin white strokes, abstract placeholder bars, a small cyan source anchor dot, and one muted gold corner marker. No readable text, no logos, no real web page, no fake data, no real person face, no collage, no split panels, no purple-blue AI template styling. Single coherent frame, one composed scene or object detail, not a collage, not a grid, not a contact sheet, not a scrapbook, not a mood board layout.

No readable text, no logos, no factual claims, no fake browser content, no collage, no real photography mood board, no purple-blue gradient. Single coherent frame, one composed scene or object detail, not a collage, not a grid, not a contact sheet, not a scrapbook, not a mood board layout.

On the left and right side lanes, a small stack of matte dark glass information cards floats with physical depth, staggered shadows, thin white edges, one cyan edge line, and one muted gold active-card marker. items.title: Model Structure Overlay - Agent Pipeline
items.caption: Nodes and lines explain an Agent flow without pretending to be a factual architecture diagram.
items.source: Component family: 模型结构浮层
items.motif: nodes, growing connector lines, highlighted route, presenter-centered frame
items.prompt: Single motion-graphics reference frame for an AI technology talking-head video, 16:9. Centered abstract presenter silhouette with protected central safety zone and empty bottom subtitle band. Around the side lanes, a minimal agent-pipeline overlay of small dark glass nodes and thin cyan connector lines grows around the presenter without covering the face area. One node glows muted gold as the current step. No readable labels, no logos, no fake architecture facts, no dense HUD, no collage, no purple-blue AI template. Single coherent frame, one composed scene or object detail, not a collage, not a grid, not a contact sheet, not a scrapbook, not a mood board layout.

items.title: Tool Comparison Balance
items.caption: Two tool options sit left and right, while the presenter remains the judge in the center.

Two balanced dark glass comparison panels float symmetrically in the left and right side lanes, connected by a thin central balance line that does not cover the presenter. Single coherent frame, one composed scene or object detail, not a collage, not a grid, not a contact sheet, not a scrapbook, not a mood board layout.
